%window-add @1
%window-pane-changed @1 %1
%layout-change @1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 *
%window-renamed @1 bash
%window-add @2
%window-pane-changed @2 %2
%layout-change @2 6b23,220x50,0,0,%2 6b23,220x50,0,0,%2 -
%layout-change @1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 *
%window-renamed @2 vim
%window-pane-changed @1 %1
%layout-change @2 6b23,220x50,0,0,%2 6b23,220x50,0,0,%2 -
%layout-change @1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 *
%window-close @2
%layout-change @1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 *
%window-add @3
%window-pane-changed @3 %3
%layout-change @3 7c34,220x50,0,0,%3 7c34,220x50,0,0,%3 -
%window-renamed @3 zsh
%window-close @3
